files.notes: This file contains the Guide Lessons section with four distinct lesson topics: Theology (Repentance), Genealogy (Individual and Family Histories), Home Ethics (Integrity), and Art (architecture and music). The file also contains extensive advertisements at the end which are not part of the lesson content.
